title: Gourmet Pizza (Overhead Hero)
summary: Steaming Neapolitan pizza shot from above - bubbling cheese, fresh basil, charred crust.
prompt: An overhead food-magazine hero shot of a fresh-from-the-oven Neapolitan pizza on dark wood: bubbling mozzarella with golden char spots, vivid scarlet san-marzano tomato sauce, bright green basil leaves, ribbons of olive oil, charred leopard-spotted crust, flecks of sea salt and parmesan. Light steam rising. Soft directional window light from the upper left. Magazine-cover food photography aesthetic, hyper-detailed, square 1:1.
